title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 630.045 - Appointment of persons for civil involuntary detention actions
text:
630.045.  Appointment of persons for civil involuntary detention actions. — The director of the department may authorize such persons as are necessary to carry out the civil involuntary detention requirements of chapter 632.
(L. 1980 H.B. 1724, A.L. 2008 S.B. 1081, A.L. 2023 S.B. 106)
